message:
test(unit): expand crash.rs (79→121) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 42 new tests covering replay_incident_bundle (8 tests),
collect_incident_bundle (3 tests), struct serialization for
ReplayMode/ReplayCheck/ReplayResult/RedactionReport/DbMetadata/
PanePriorityOverrideSnapshot/CrashLoopDiagnostics/IncidentKind/
IncidentBundleResult (14 tests), HealthSnapshot optional fields (2),
write_redacted_file (1), days_to_ymd boundaries (2),
CrashLoopDetector accessors (2), ShutdownSummary (1),
CrashManifest edge cases (2), and additional edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
